meta.title: Tevi Troy on Fox Business Discussing President Obama and the Health Care Laws
meta.description: Hudson Visiting Senior Fellow Tevi Troy joined Fox Business on December 28 to discuss how the health care laws may affect President Obama's reelection chances.
